pi_items.metadata_value: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator (VLT M12 V-band mosaic)
pi_items.verified_value: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator (VLT M12 V-band mosaic)
pi_items.source: Code analysis of install_astroimagej.sh, setup_task.sh, and verification against ESA Hubble website (esahubble.org).
Code analysis of export_result.sh, setup_task.sh, and task.json.
Code analysis of export_result.sh and task.json.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh (uniform_filter size and bounding box bounds) and task.json instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real VLT V-band observations of the globular cluster Messier 12 (M12) downloaded from the ESA/ESO/NASA FITS Liberator dataset. The task requires the extraction of a 300x300 pixel subframe centered on the cluster core. The expected outputs are exactly a FITS file at /home/ga/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/m12_core_subframe.fits and a report at /home/ga/AstroImages/cluster_extraction/output/extraction_report.txt.
